sections.heading: Built on honest work and clean job sites
body: Mike DeJusto has worked in plumbing since 1988, learning the trade on high-end homes and remodels across Marin, Sonoma, San Francisco, and the greater Bay Area. He founded DeJusto Plumbing in 2016 to give Sonoma County a plumber who shows up, explains the work clearly, and stands behind it. He's PHCC school-trained and carries Gastite, Uponor Wirsbo, and fire sprinkler certifications.

As an owner-operator, Mike does the work himself — from a backed-up drain to a whole-home re-pipe to custom-designed systems for new construction. Customers know him for straightforward communication, fair pricing, and leaving the job site as clean as he found it. His dog Sadie often rides along to keep things friendly.
highlights: Owner-operated since 2016 — you work with Mike, not a call center
35+ years of plumbing experience; in the trade since 1988
Serving Santa Rosa, Petaluma, Rohnert Park, Windsor, Healdsburg & Sonoma County

items.title: Emergency & General Repairs
items.description: Same-day help for leaks, clogs, and failures, plus everyday repairs to faucets, sinks, toilets, and garbage disposals. Mike diagnoses the problem and shows you what's wrong before fixing it.

items.title: Water Heaters & Tankless Systems
items.description: Repair, maintenance, and new installation of tank and tankless water heaters, including warranty work and hot-water recirculation systems.

items.title: Drain Cleaning & Hydro Jetting
items.description: Clearing slow and blocked drains, sewer clean-outs, and high-pressure hydro jetting to fully scour lines back to flow.

items.title: Sewer Line Repair & Camera Inspection
items.description: Sewer main repair and replacement with in-line camera inspections to pinpoint root intrusion, breaks, and blockages before any digging.

items.title: Gas Line Installation & Repair
items.description: Gastite-certified gas line installation, extension, and repair for appliances, ranges, and outdoor connections — done to code.

items.title: Whole-Home Re-Piping & Appliance Hookups
items.description: Full water re-pipes for aging or failing plumbing, plus appliance installation and custom-designed systems for remodels and new construction.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message DeJusto Plumbing and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: Mike came out the same day I called and was honest, explaining everything he was doing as he did it. Reliable, tidy, and fair-priced — I'd highly recommend DeJusto Plumbing.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

items.quote: Professional, efficient, and kind. He's the guy for your plumbing needs.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa
